instruction: Open Notes and delete the note titled {TARGET}. Leave every other note untouched.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity); AndroidWorld validate_rows_removal_integrity over the live Notes title set — deleting all notes scores 0, deleting only the target scores 1

args: for n in Recipe "Meeting notes" Wishlist "Phone numbers" Journal Budget; do osascript -e "tell application \"Notes\" to delete (every note whose name is \"$n\")" 2>/dev/null || true; done; for n in Journal Budget "{TARGET}"; do osascript -e "tell application \"Notes\" to make new note with properties {name:\"$n\", body:\"$n\"}" 2>/dev/null || true; done; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench"; osascript -e 'set t to name of every note of application "Notes"' -e 'set AppleScript'\''s text item delimiters to linefeed' -e 'return (t as text)' 2>/dev/null > "$HOME/.guibench/notes.before"
osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete (every note whose name is "{TARGET}")' 2>/dev/null || true
